title: My hero and me [MHA]
description: A modpack inspired of the anime My Hero Academia
body:
This is a modpack inspired by the anime My Hero Academia where you can be a hero and save others and become the symbol of peace or become the villan and stop the hero's and rule the world the choice is yours to do and become the best at it 

you can use the different powers of hero's or villens and you can wear outfits of them too and you really should try this out if you like the anime MHA, I hope you enjoy it

(I'm not the owner of any mods used)
